# @byted-service/logagent

[![bnpm](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/v/@byted-service/logagent.svg?style=flat-square)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/logagent) [![download](https://2y8ngapf.fn.bytedance.net/d?p=@byted-service/logagent)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/logagent)

[简体中文](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/logagent/README.md) | [English](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/logagent/README.en.md) | [CHANGELOG](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/logagent/CHANGELOG.md)

> Note: @byted-service/logagent is a low-level basic library, and it is generally not recommended to use it directly in business.
>
> 1. If you need to print the log, it is recommended to use [@byted-service/logger](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/tree/master/packages/logger), which has encapsulated the call to logagent and supports Output to various log systems (files, Console, LogAgent, Databus, etc.)
> 2. If the log is printed in some business framework(such as Gulu, Koa, Express), there are already related plug-ins that are encapsulated on the basis of @byted-service/logger, you can directly use the methods provided by the plug-in
>
> -   Gulu [access-log](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/gulu/tree/master/packages/byted-gulu-access-log), [ms-logger](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/gulu/tree/master/packages/byted-gulu-ms-loggerww)
> -   Koa & Express [@fe/middlewares](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@fe/middlewares)

## Installation

```bash
npm install @byted-service/logagent --registry=http://bnpm.byted.org
```

## Create a LogAgent instance

```js
const LogAgent = require('@byted-service/logagent');

const agent = new LogAgent(options);
```

options Other configurable parameters

-   `psm`: The default value is detected from the environment variable, psm of the current project
-   `maxLen`: The buffer size, the default maximum is 60k, a single log content exceeding 100kb will be truncated, and only the first 100kb part will be retained
-   `sendInterval`: refresh buffer interval, unit is ms, default is 10240

## Instructions

```js
const LogAgent = require('@byted-service/logagent');

const agent = new LogAgent();

agent.send('p.s.m', {
    msg: 'THE LOG MESSAGE  n',
    tags: {
        _level: 'error',
        _ip: '127.0.0.1'
    }
});

// or

agent.send({
    msg: 'THE LOG MESSAGE  n',
    tags: {
        _level: 'error',
        _ip: '127.0.0.1'
    }
});
```

For the parameters of `LogAgent.send()` see: `LogAgentMessageType` or document: https://bytedance.feishu.cn/space/doc/uhnP66an8j3qU0mn2Kjywd

## Metrics

```
// logagent sending count
toutiao.infra.ttlogagent.nodejssdk_v1.{psm}.send
```

-   tags
    -   status
        -   success
        -   error
    -   reason
        -   encodeError: Encoding failed
        -   packetTooLongError: The packet is too long. By default, the length of msg will be cropped by itself, but if it is still too long after trying to crop, it will be dotted
        -   sendHttpError: http send failed
        -   socketLostError: socket is missing
